tips.title: Use XML tags to structure your prompts
tips.content: Wrap different parts of your prompt in XML tags like <instructions>, <context>, <examples> to help Claude clearly separate different parts of the input. This dramatically improves output quality for complex tasks.

tips.title: Chain prompts for complex multi-step tasks
tips.content: Instead of one giant prompt, break complex tasks into a chain: Step 1 extracts data, Step 2 analyzes it, Step 3 formats output. Each step is smaller, more reliable, and easier to debug.
